name: Geometric Armchair
description: Ergonomic design meets strict square aesthetics. Crafted with premium sustainable materials and a focus on 0px corner precision.

name: Minimalist Workstation
description: A desk designed for maximum productivity. Features an 8px grid-aligned surface and seamless brand-blue cable management.

name: Architectural Shelf
description: A minimalist shelving solution designed for pure functional clarity. Stripped of all excess, it embodies the essence of vertical storage.

name: Neural Console
description: A high-end media console designed for the modern digital hub. Featuring biometric access and integrated cooling for hardware.
